## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem you're trying to solve. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like to see implemented.

## Alternative Solutions
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Benefits
Explain the benefits this feature would bring to the project.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Technical Considerations
(Optional) Any technical details, dependencies, or constraints to consider.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
